homepage_description: SteamHistory's primary purpose be fer gatherin' 'n then storin' a Steam Profile's historic 'n or current information in a central place.

profile_premium_tooltip: Indicates if the user has a premium (paid) Steam account

notification_dock_signin_to_vote: Sign in wit' Steam t' vote!
notification_dock_poll_disclaimer: Polls be used t' gather community thoughts 'n opinions, nah as final decisions.
faq_q1_p1: SteamHistory be a tool fer trackin' Steam profile histories. Ye can search fer any Steam user t' view thar past usernames, profile pictures, mateys, 'n comments.
faq_q1_p2: Simply use the search bar on the homepage t' look up a user by thar SteamID64, profile URL, or custom URL.
faq_q2_title: Be loggin' in wit' Steam safe?
faq_q2_p1: Aye, loggin' in wit' Steam be safe. We use Steam's implementation o' OpenID, a standard 'n secure authentication system.
faq_q2_p2: When ye choose t' log in wit' Steam, ye be redirected t' the official Steam Community website t' enter yer credentials. SteamHistory.net ne'er sees or stores yer password.
faq_q2_p3: Aft ye successfully log in on the Steam website, Steam securely sends us only yer unique 64-bit SteamID, which we use t' identify yer account. Dis process ensures dat yer login details remain private 'n secure.
faq_q2_p4_1: Ye can read more about how Steam handles third-party authentication in the official
faq_q2_p4_link: Steamworks documentation on Web Browser based authentication
faq_q3_title: How do I become a supporter?
faq_q3_p1_1: Ye can become a supporter either by usin' Ko-Fi or tradin' TF2 items by visitin' our
faq_q3_p1_2: . Supporters get access t' exclusive features like profile customization.
faq_q3_p2: Both one-time donations 'n memberships grant supporter perks. Fer one-time donations, the duration o' supporter status be calculated as:
faq_q3_p3_1: Any leftover amount be stored as credit 'n applied t' future donations. Fer example, donatin' $13 provides
faq_q3_p3_5: carried o'er. If the same user donates another $2 later, the credit completes another $5, grantin'
faq_q4_title: How do I link me supporter status from Ko-Fi?
faq_q4_p1: Aft donatin' on Ko-fi, ye will receive an email from steamhistory.net wit' a transaction ID.
faq_q4_p2_2: 'n enter the email address dat received the email 'n the transaction ID into the provided fields t' link yer supporter status.
faq_q5_p1: SourceBans++ be a community-driven admin, ban, 'n communication management system fer game servers runnin' on the Source engine. It allows server administrators t' manage bans 'n communications across a network o' servers.
faq_q5_p2: We use dis data t' provide additional context on user profiles fer games like Crew Fortress 2, Garry's Mod, CS:GO, CS2, 'n Counter-Strike: Source.
faq_q5_p3_1: Ye can find more information on the
faq_q6_p1_1: TF2 Bot Detector be a tool dat automatically detects 'n helps votekick cheaters 'n bots in Crew Fortress 2 casual matches. While the original project be archived, a community-maintained fork be available at
faq_q7_p1: We use third-party data from sources like SourceBans 'n TF2 Bot Detector t' provide a more comprehensive 'n informative user experience. Dis data be displayed on user profiles t' give ye a better understandin' o' a player's history 'n community standin'.
faq_q7_p2: Fer example, ye can see if a user has any active bans on SourceBans-integrated servers directly on thar SteamHistory profile.
faq_q8_title: Wha' be the 'API' tool 'n how do I use it?
faq_q8_p1: The SteamHistory API currently provides an endpoint t' retrieve all SourceBans data we 'ave logged fer a user or a list o' users. Dis can be useful fer developers who wants t' integrate our data into thar owns applications.
faq_q8_p2_1: A community-maintained fork o' TF2 Bot Detector by surepy, available at
privacy_s1_p1: Ahoy t' SteamHistory.net. We be committed t' protectin' yer privacy 'n bein' transparent about how we handle yer data. Dis Privacy Policy explains wha' information we collect, how we use it, 'n wha' rights ye 'ave in relation t' it.
privacy_s1_p2: Dis service be an independent project 'n ain't affiliated wit', endorsed by, or in any way officially connected wit' Valve Corporation or Steam.
privacy_s2_p1: Our service archives publicly available information from the Steam platform 'n other third-party sources t' provide a comprehensive history. The data we collect 'n display includes:
privacy_s2_l1_2: Yer public Steam profile information, includin' yer SteamID, persona name (current 'n historical), real name (if public), avatar (current 'n historical), public comments, mateys list, 'n official ban information (VAC, game, 'n community bans).
privacy_s2_l2_2: We also collect ban information from third-party services such as Sourcebans 'n TF2BD (Crew Fortress 2 Bot Detector) t' provide additional context on user behavior, mighty concernin' hornswagglin' 'n malicious activity.
privacy_s2_l3_2: If ye log in t' our Service via Steam, we collect 'n store information necessary t' provide account-specific features. Dis includes yer SteamID t' manage yer session, yer list o' "watched users," 'n yer supporter status.
privacy_s2_l4_2: When ye be logged in, ye 'ave the option t' add private notes t' user profiles. These notes be stored on our servers 'n be only visible t' ye. They be nah shared wit' other users or third parties.
privacy_s2_p2: We do nah collect any non-public information from yer Steam account, such as yer password or email address. Financial transactions fer supporter status be handled by our bounty processor, Ko-Fi. When ye become a supporter, we receive the followin' information from Ko-Fi: yer name, the email address ye used fer the transaction, the amount donated, 'n a unique transaction ID. We use dis information solely t' verify yer bounty, grant supporter perks t' yer SteamHistory account, 'n fer internal financial log-keepin'. We do nah receive or store yer credit card information or other sensitive bounty details.
privacy_s3_p1: The information we collect be used fer the followin' purposes:
privacy_s3_l1: T' provide a historical archive o' public Steam profile data fer users t' view.
privacy_s3_l2: T' manage yer user account, includin' providin' access t' supporter-only features 'n managin' yer list o' watched users.
privacy_s3_l3_2: We use publicly available scallywags lists t' reconstruct potentially private scallywags lists. Fer example, if User A has a private scallywags list but be mateys wit' User B (who has a public list), we can infer dat User A be scallywags wit' User B. By aggregatin' dis information from many public profiles, we can provide a more complete picture o' a user's connections.
privacy_s3_p2: Our legal basis fer processin' dis data be our legitimate interest in operatin' a comprehensive archival 'n research service.
privacy_s4_p1: We do nah sell yer personal data. Howe'er, we may share information under the followin' circumstances:
privacy_s4_l1_2: We share information wit' third-party bounty processors like Ko-Fi t' manage supporter bounties. We only share the necessary information t' complete the transaction, 'n yer bounty details be handled directly by the processor.
privacy_s4_l2_2_pre: We may use third-party advertisin' companies, such as NitroPay, t' serve ads when ye visit our website. These companies may use cookies 'n web beacons t' collect information about yer visits t' dis 'n other websites in order t' provide advertisements about booty 'n services o' interest t' ye. Fer more information on how NitroPay handles privacy, please see thar
privacy_s5_p1: While SteamHistory.net ain't located within the European Union 'n does nah specifically target EU residents, we honor all users' requests fer data removal, irrespective o' thar geographic location.
privacy_s5_p2_1: Right t' Erasure (Right t' be Forgotten):
privacy_s5_p2_2_pre: If ye wish t' request the removal o' yer personal data from our Service, please visit
privacy_s5_p2_2_post: (login required). T' ensure we be processin' a request from the legitimate owner o' the account, we may require ye t' verify yer identity. The simplest way t' do 'tis by loggin' into SteamHistory.net via Steam, which confirms yer ownership o' the account. Fer residents o' the EU, dis verification process be in accordance wit' GDPR Tale 12, Section 6.
privacy_s5_p3: Please note dat dis removal process applies only t' data stored on SteamHistory.net's servers. We do nah 'ave control o'er data held by third-party services such as Sourcebans or TF2BD. Ye must contact those services directly t' request the removal o' yer data from thar platforms.
privacy_s5_p4: Additionally, as outlined in our Terms o' Service, we may retain non-personal data related t' malicious activities fer the security 'n protection o' the service 'n its community.
privacy_s6_p1: Our website uses cookies. Cookies be wee text files dat be placed on yer machine t' help the site provide a better user experience. We use cookies fer:
privacy_s6_l1_2: Such as keepin' ye logged in.
privacy_s6_l2_2: As mentioned above, third-party advertisers like NitroPay use cookies t' serve personalized ads. Fer information about optin' out o' personalized advertisin', please refer t' the advertiser's privacy policy.
privacy_s7_p1: We retain the public data we collect fer as long as it remains publicly available on the source platforms (e.g., Steam). If data be scuttled from the source, it may still be retained in our archives fer historical purposes. If ye request the removal o' yer data, we shall scuttle it from our active databases.
privacy_s7_p2: Fer financial 'n legal reasons, we be required t' retain transactional data from our bounty processor (Ko-Fi) fer a specific period. Dis data be kept securely 'n be used only fer accountin' 'n compliance purposes.
privacy_s8_p1: We may update dis Privacy Policy from time t' time. Any changes will be posted on dis page wit' an updated "Last Updated" date. Ye be advised t' review dis Privacy Policy periodically fer any changes. Continued use o' the service aft such changes constitutes yer acceptance o' the new policy.
tos_s1_p1: By accessin' or usin' SteamHistory.net (the "Service"), ye agree t' be bound by these Terms o' Service ("Terms"). If ye do nah agree t' these Terms, ye may nah use the Service.
tos_s1_p2: Dis Service be an independent project 'n ain't affiliated wit', endorsed by, or in any way officially connected wit' Valve Corporation or Steam.
tos_s2_p1: SteamHistory.net be a third-party service dat archives 'n displays publicly available data from the Steam platform 'n other public third-party sources (such as Sourcebans 'n TF2BD). The purpose o' the Service be t' provide a historical log o' public user information, includin' data related t' hornswagglin' 'n malicious activity.
tos_s3_p1: Ye agree nah t' use the Service fer any purpose dat be illegal or prohibited by these Terms. Ye agree nah t':
tos_s3_l1: Use the Service in any way dat could damage, disable, overburden, or impair the Service.
tos_s3_l2: Attempt t' gain unauthorized access t' any part o' the Service.
tos_s3_l3: Use any automated system, includin' "bots," "spiders," or "offline readers," t' access the Service in a manner dat sends more request messages t' the servers than a human can reasonably produce in the same period by usin' a conventional on-line web browser.
tos_s3_l4: If ye be provided wit' access t' our API, ye agree nah t' misuse it, includin' but nah limited t', exceedin' rate limits, attemptin' t' reverse-engineer its functionality, or usin' it fer any purpose dat violates these Terms or ain't expressly permitted.
tos_s4_p1: All data displayed on the Service, includin' but nah limited t' usernames, avatars, 'n comments, be the property o' Valve Corporation 'n/or its respective users. The Steam name 'n logo be trademarks o' Valve Corporation.
tos_s4_p2: Our Service be provided fer personal, non-commercial use only. Ye agree nah t' exploit the Service or any o' its parts fer any commercial purpose, in accordance wit' the Steam Subscriber Agreement.
tos_s5_p1: We offer optional supporter tiers dat provide access t' enhanced features. Ye can become a supporter through a one-time donation or a recurrin' monthly subscription, managed through our third-party bounty processor (e.g., Ko-Fi). By becomin' a supporter, ye agree t' the followin' terms:
tos_s5_l1_2: Supporters gain access t' features includin', but nah limited t': Multi-Source Search (searchin' by persona name, real name, URL, 'n AvatarHash), Comment Search, viewin' o' scuttled comments, Matey Swappin' (reconstructin' a private hearties list from public data), 'n cosmetic profile customizations.
tos_s5_l2_3: Donations be cumulative. Fer every $5 donated, ye will receive 30 days o' supporter access. Fer example, a single $15 donation grants 90 days o' access.
tos_s5_l2_5: If ye choose a monthly subscription, yer bounty will be processed automatically each month. Ye can scuttle yer subscription at any time through the bounty processor's interface.
tos_s5_l3_2: All bounties fer supporter access, whether through one-time donations or subscriptions, be final 'n non-refundable.
tos_s5_l4_2: Initiatin' a chargeback without first contactin' us t' resolve a bounty issue will result in a permanent ban from all SteamHistory services.
tos_s6_p1: The Service be provided on an "AS BE" 'n "AS AVAILABLE" basis. We make no warranties, express or implied, regardin' the accuracy, reliability, or completeness o' the data provided. The data be sourced from the Steam Web API 'n other third-party services, 'n we be nah responsible fer any errors or omissions from these sources.
tos_s6_p2: In no event shall SteamHistory.net or its operators be liable fer any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arisin' out o' or in connection wit' yer use o' the Service.
tos_s7_p1_1: We be committed t' complyin' wit' data protection codes o' conduct like GDPR 'n honorin' our users' "right t' be forgotten." If ye wish t' request the removal o' yer personal data from our Service, please visit
tos_s7_p1_2: (login required), 'n we shall process yer request.
tos_s7_p2: Please note dat our Service displays data from third-party sources such as Sourcebans 'n TF2BD. We do nah control dis data 'n can nah modify or scuttle it. T' 'ave such data scuttled, ye must contact the respective third-party service directly.
tos_s7_p3: Furthermore, as a service dedicated t' maintainin' a historical archive fer the benefit o' the gamin' community, mighty concernin' malicious activities, we reserve starb'rd t' retain anonymized, non-personal data related t' such activities fer security 'n archival purposes. 'tis t' protect the integrity o' the Service 'n its users. Any such retention will be done in accordance wit' applicable codes o' conduct.
tos_s8_p1: The Service be intended fer users who be at least 13 years ole. By usin' the Service, ye represent 'n warrant dat ye be at least 13 years o' age. If we become aware dat a user be under 13, we shall take steps t' scuttle thar information 'n terminate thar account.
tos_s9_p1: Any disputes arisin' out o' or in connection wit' these Terms or yer use o' the Service shall be governed by the codes o' conduct o' the jurisdiction in which the Service's operators be based, without regard t' its conflict o' code o' conduct provisions. Ye agree t' submit t' the personal 'n exclusive jurisdiction o' the courts located within dat jurisdiction.
tos_s10_p1_1: Yer privacy be impor'ant t' us. Please review our
tos_s10_p1_2: t' understand how we collect, use, 'n protect yer information.
tos_s11_p1: We reserve starb'rd t' modify these Terms at any time. Any changes will be posted on dis page wit' an updated "Last Updated" date. Yer continued use o' the Service aft any such changes constitutes yer acceptance o' the new Terms. Ye be advised t' review these Terms periodically fer any changes.
tos_s12_p1_1: If ye 'ave any riddles about these Terms, please contact us at
tos_s12_p1_2: . Fer requests related t' data privacy 'n removal, please visit
supporter_subtitle: Support SteamHistory.net 'n unlock exclusive features t' enhance yer experience
supporter_f1_desc: Find comments made by a specific SteamID or containin' specific words
supporter_f2_desc: Ability t' view all scuttled comments on a viewed profile
supporter_f3_desc: View a user's mateys even if thar scallywags list be private
supporter_f4_desc: Allows the ability t' customize yer SH profile in a multitude o' ways, purely cosmetic
supporter_f5_desc: No on-site ads while logged in
supporter_f6_desc: Access t' the tester 'n supporter channel fer early use/discussion o' WIP features
supporter_kofi_desc: Support us directly through Ko-Fi wit' one-time donations or monthly memberships.
supporter_duration_calc: Duration Calculation: Each $5 donated = 30 days o' supporter status
supporter_bucket_system: Bucket System: Donations accumulate 'til they reach $5 increments
supporter_bucket_ex1: Example 1: Donate $15 = 90 days (3 months) o' supporter status
supporter_bucket_ex2: Example 2: Donate $3, then later $2 = 30 days once total reaches $5
supporter_linking_p1: Aft donatin' through Ko-Fi, ye'll receive an email wit' a transaction ID.
supporter_linking_li2: Boardin' yer Ko-Fi email 'n transaction ID
supporter_linking_li3: Yer supporter features will be activated immediately
search_bulk_identifiers_placeholder: Enter one identifier per line (SteamID64, Custom URL, etc.)
data_removal_current_name_warning: Dis entry can nah be scuttled 'cause 'tis too similar t' yer current display name.
data_removal_persona_placeholder: Please explain why ye wants dis persona name scuttled...
data_removal_realname_placeholder: Please explain why ye wants dis real name scuttled...
data_removal_url_placeholder: Please explain why ye wants dis URL scuttled...
data_removal_pfp_placeholder: Please explain why ye wants dis profile picture scuttled...
data_removal_overall_reason_desc: Please provide an overall explanation fer why ye wants these data entries scuttled. Dis will help our administrators understand yer request better.
data_removal_overall_placeholder: Explain why ye wants dis data scuttled...
data_removal_duplicate_error: Please provide unique reasons fer each data entry. Duplicate reasons be nah allowed.
data_removal_min_words_error: Please ensure all reasons meet the minimum {count} word requirement.
data_removal_confirm_p1: By submittin' dis request, ye confirm dat:
data_removal_confirm_li1: Yer request follows the PII guidelines defined in the Impor'ant Information section above.
data_removal_confirm_li2: Ye 'ave read the Impor'ant Information section fully.
suggestion_description: Help us improve SteamHistory by sharin' yer ideas 'n feedback.
suggestion_placeholder: Share yer suggestion or feedback here...
beta_popup_p1: Dis redesign be currently in beta. If ye encounter any bugs or 'ave feedback, please report 'em in our
beta_popup_p2: Ye can also find the Discord link on the navbar at the top right.
search_supporter_only_description: 'tis a supporter-only feature. Please support the project t' gain access.
search_supporter_expired_description: Yer supporter status has expired. Please renew yer support t' continue usin' dis feature.
sources_meta_description: View all the sources dat Steam History uses t' gather data about Steam accounts, includin' SourceBans, RustWho, 'n TF2BD lists.
sources_description: Steam History gathers data from various sources t' provide comprehensive information about Steam accounts. Below be all the sources we use fer our database.
api_no_key: Ye 'ave nah generated an API key yet.
api_manage_key: Ye can manage yer API key in the {settingsLink} page.
teams_name_hint: The primary name fer yer group.
teams_vanity_hint: A unique short link fer yer crew profile.
teams_vanity_readonly_hint: Vanity URLs can nah be changed aft creation.
team_delete_confirm: Be ye sure ye wants t' scuttle dis crew? Dis will scuttle all hands.
team_name_change_warning: Changin' the name releases the ole one immediately.
team_vanity_readonly_hint: Vanity URLs can nah be changed aft creation.
team_remove_member_confirm: Be ye sure ye wants t' scuttle dis hand from the crew?
team_invite_member_hint: Invited users must 'ave an existin' SteamHistory.net profile.
team_membership_hidden_hint: Yer membership be hidden. Ye will nah appear in public hand lists fer non-staff.
team_membership_visible_hint: Yer membership be public. Any rogue can see dat ye be part o' dis crew.
team_leave_confirm: Be ye sure ye wants t' weigh anchor {name}?
team_owner_leave_hint: Owners can nah leave thar owns crew. Ye must scuttle the crew t' resign.
friendgroups_form_description: Explore scallywag networks startin' from a specific user
friendgroups_disabled_prod: Dis feature be disabled in production.
account_preview_hint: Preview o' how yer profile will appear
account_reset_confirm: Be ye sure ye wants t' reset yer settings t' default?
account_supporter_expired_desc: Yer supporter benefits 'ave expired. Renew t' continue customizin' yer profile.
account_become_supporter_desc: Unlock profile customization 'n other exclusive features by becomin' a supporter.
account_link_kofi_desc: Aft donatin' on Ko-fi, ye'll receive an email wit' a transaction ID. Enter yer details below t' link yer supporter status.
account_watch_limit_reached_tooltip: Watch limit reached! Ye must become a supporter t' watch more users.
account_watch_limit_nearing_tooltip: Watch limit nearin'. Skewer t' become a supporter 'n increase yer limit t' 32 users.
account_no_watched_users: Ye be nah currently watchin' any users.
account_search_to_watch: Search fer a user t' begin watchin' thar profile.
account_no_notes: Ye haven't added any notes t' users yet.
account_visit_to_add_note: Visit a user's profile t' add personal notes.
account_revoke_confirm: Be ye sure ye wants t' revoke yer API key? Dis action be irreversible 'n will break any applications usin' it.
account_discord_role_hint: Note: It may take around 5 minutes fer the Verified role t' be applied in the Discord server.
account_discord_link_li1: Get the Verified role in the Discord fer media permissions
account_discord_link_li2: Use the 'Watch User' feature 'n be notified directly via Discord o' changes t' a profile
friendgroups_form_desc: Explore scallywag networks startin' from a specific user
friendgroups_mobile_tip: Tip: Tap nodes t' view details 'n connections
friendgroups_disabled_production: Dis feature be disabled in production.
history_no_data: No data available fer dis user.
privacy_meta_description: SteamHistory.net Privacy Policy. Learn how we collect, use, 'n protect yer data.
login_required_desc: Ye must be logged in t' access dis page.
teams_confirm_kick: Be ye sure ye wants t' kick dis hand?
teams_confirm_promote: Be ye sure ye wants t' promote dis hand?
teams_confirm_demote: Be ye sure ye wants t' demote dis hand?
teams_invite_hint: Invited users must 'ave an existin' SteamHistory.net profile.
teams_confirm_delete: Be ye sure ye wants t' scuttle dis crew? Dis action be irreversible.
teams_membership_hidden_hint: Yer membership be hidden. Ye will nah appear in public hand lists fer non-staff.
teams_membership_public_hint: Yer membership be public. Any scallywag can see dat ye be part o' dis crew.
teams_confirm_leave: Be ye sure ye wants t' leave dis crew?
teams_note_delete_confirm: Be ye sure ye wants t' scuttle dis note?
